message:
test(dashboard): attention feed test serialization, popup cursor tests, render badge tests, beads metadata

Dashboard test infrastructure and comprehensive attention rendering tests:

Test infrastructure (testmain_test.go):
- Add attentionFeedTestMu mutex and lockAttentionFeedForTest(t) helper
  to serialize tests that mutate the global attention feed singleton
  (eliminates race conditions in parallel test runs)

Popup tests (dashboard_popup_test.go):
- requestedAttentionCursor exact match and nearest fallback tests
- Popup zoom using selected item cursor (verifies cursor in hint and
  webhook event)
- lockAttentionFeedForTest applied to existing tests that had races

Render pure tests (dashboard_render_pure_test.go):
- renderAttentionBadge(): nil panel, unavailable feed, no items,
  action count, interesting count, both counts
- Overlay badge attention state reflection (red/yellow/teal coloring)
- Stats bar attention badge in non-popup vs popup modes (verifying
  no duplication)

Beads metadata (.beads/issues.jsonl):
- Update status for Attention Feed Phase 1c and Conflict Events issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
